supported_devices: LED grow lights, inline fans, clip fans, heaters, dehumidifiers, humidifiers, S-Station smart plugs, GGS environmental sensors
compatible_ec_fans: Spider Farmer HEXA fans, GGS inline fans with RJ12 port
compatible_lights: Spider Farmer SF series (excl. SF300, SF600, SF1000D), G series, SE series; up to 500 LED lights per zone
compatible_sensors: Spider Farmer GGS 5-in-1 SensorPro (temp, humidity, CO2, PPFD, VPD) included; GGS 3-in-1 soil sensor (optional)
compatible_humidifiers: Spider Farmer humidifiers via connected S-Station or GGS AC power strip
compatible_irrigation: Spider Farmer drip irrigation via connected S-Station or GGS AC power strip
compatible_co2_equipment: Spider Farmer CO2 equipment via connected S-Station or GGS AC power strip
supported_manufacturer_series: SF series, G series, SE series, HEXA series fans
recommended_use_note: Industrial and commercial grow facility controller; manages up to 8 independent grow zones each with up to 20 Spider Farmer devices and up to 500 LED grow lights per zone
uvp_notes: Regular retail price at GoGrow.de (€419.99); WonderGrow.de lists €429.00; official Spider Farmer EU price not confirmed directly
notes: Designed for commercial/industrial grows. Includes GGS 5-in-1 SensorPro (temp, humidity, CO2, PPFD, VPD), GGS Pro Adapter, GGS Light Adapter, 3x RJ12 cables (2.5m) + 1x waterproof RJ12 cable, wall-mount rail. Controller input: 12V DC/4A via 100-240V AC adapter. Dimensions: 286x177x32mm, 909g. No built-in AC outlets; requires connected S-Stations or GGS AC strips for AC outlet device control. Not found on Amazon.de as of 2026-06-28.
